New in 2.0

An AI that's still working on your business when you're not talking to it.

Most AI tools forget you the moment you close the tab. Business Coach remembers your goals, tracks your progress, and picks up exactly where you left off — every time you open it.

  • Remembers your full conversation history and goals across every session, not just the current chat
  • Suggests concrete goals as you talk — one click to start tracking them on your dashboard
  • Notices repetitive manual work and offers to build a personal tool for it, right in the conversation — tested before it's saved, wired to your own account only, never shared
  • Can generate a logo, business card, or letterhead on request, using whichever image provider you choose — free options shown first, nothing paid picked for you
  • Shows its reasoning live while it thinks, instead of sitting there with no feedback

New in 2.0

A community of agents, without the risk of running someone else's code blind.

Browse agents other AI Partner users have built, or share your own from the Agent Builder.

  • Every submission is automatically screened for malicious instructions, then human-reviewed before it's listed
  • Imported agents stage every file change for your approval — nothing writes to your machine automatically
  • Each agent carries a trust tier — New, Community-Tested, or Trusted — earned over time from real submission history, not bought with reviews
  • Comments and download counts on every agent, so you know what's actually useful

FAQ

Good to know

I already bought AI Partner — do I pay again for 2.0?

No. 2.0 is a free update for existing owners. Download the new installer and activate with your existing license.

Do I need to install Python?

No — as of 2.0, the installer bundles everything the backend needs. You still need Ollama for the local AI engine, which the app will guide you through installing.

Is importing community agents safe?

Every shared agent goes through automated screening plus human review before it's listed, and anything you import runs with file changes staged for your approval — nothing happens automatically.

Can I use it on a new computer?

Yes — it's a portable license. Move your install to a new machine anytime, no extra charge.

What if my computer can't run the included model?

The built-in model picker shows size and RAM requirements for each option, starting at 2GB / 4GB RAM. Pick a bigger model right from the same screen if your machine can handle it.

What's Business Coach, and is it included?

It's an ongoing coaching conversation that remembers your goals and progress between sessions — Pro tier only, since it builds on the same memory system as Total Recall.

Can Business Coach actually build things, or just talk?

Both. When you describe repetitive manual work, it offers to build a personal tool for it — tested before it's saved, and wired to your own account only, never shared with anyone else. It can also generate a logo, business card, or letterhead directly, using whichever image provider you pick (free options shown first, paid ones only if you explicitly choose them).
